A court of thorns and roses / by Sarah J. Maas. pages cm Summary: Dragged to a treacherous magical land she knows about only from stories, Feyre discovers that her captor is not an animal but Tamlin, a High Lord of the faeries. As her feelings toward him transform from hostility to a fiery passion, the threats against the faerie lands grow. Feyre must fight to break an ancient curse, or she will lose Tamlin forever. [1. Fantasy. 2. Fairies—Fiction. 3. Blessing and cursing—Fiction.] I. Title.
